action_text: Deploy inspection team; stage closure signage and diversion notice
Close crossing; mark diversion; notify transport operators
Send pre-agreed local-language alert to LC1/chief and community radio; verify boat or alternate crossing option
Notify settlement of alternate route and expected travel-time increase
Issue move-to-higher-ground advisory via chief and radio; identify shelter school
Pre-position essential drug kit and referral plan on community side of the crossing
Issue household water treatment advisory; stage purification tablets
Publish road closure to transport SACCOs and boda groups; stage repair assessment
Restrict heavy vehicles; monitor for washout
Alert head teacher; prepare early-closure and shelter protocol
